output.title: DepositBack Email Sequence: Security Deposit Demand Letter Recovery Campaign
output.meta_description: Recover your security deposit fast with state-specific demand letter templates. 3-email sequence for renters whose landlord won't return their deposit.
content_outline: Email 1: The Legal Deadline Reminder — Introduces the security deposit demand letter template and state-law urgency
Email 2: The Escalation — Addresses 'landlord won't return security deposit' with damages warnings and certified-mail proof
Email 3: The Final Notice — Pushes the security deposit refund letter with small-claims leverage and last-chance CTA
key_points: Subject Line 1: Your security deposit demand letter is ready ([State]) — Body: Hi [First Name], Every day you wait is another day your landlord keeps your money. State law gives them a hard deadline to return your deposit. Our attorney-reviewed security deposit demand letter template is pre-filled for [State]—just add your details and send it certified mail. Don't let them ignore you. CTA: Generate My Letter Now

Subject Line 2: Still no check? What to do when your landlord won't return your security deposit — Body: Hi [First Name], If your landlord missed the legal deadline, they aren't just late—they may owe you double or triple damages under [State] law. Stop sending texts that get ignored. A formal demand letter for security deposit return proves you know your rights and starts the legal clock. CTA: Start My Demand Letter Before Midnight

Subject Line 3: FINAL NOTICE: Your security deposit return letter is waiting — Body: Hi [First Name], This is it. Your security deposit refund letter is written, state-specific, and ready to send. If they ignore this certified notice, you'll have court-admissible proof that you gave them a final chance. Get your money back today. CTA: Send My Letter & Recover My Deposit

SEO Keyword Integration: security deposit demand letter, security deposit demand letter template, how to get security deposit back, landlord won't return security deposit, security deposit letter to landlord, demand letter for security deposit, security deposit refund letter, security deposit return letter, how to write security deposit letter
output.cta: Generate Your Free State-Specific Security Deposit Demand Letter in 60 Seconds
output.target_audience: US renters who have moved out within the last 30–90 days and have not received their full security deposit refund, or whose landlord is ignoring refund requests
